description: End-of-day equity market data delivery via FTP file dissemination — fixed-width flat files covering daily, weekly, and monthly statistics and corporate actions for listed securities

actors.name: Data Subscriber
actors.description: Licensed recipient who receives end-of-day equity data files

actors.name: Exchange Operations
actors.description: Exchange dissemination system that generates and delivers EOD files

actors.name: Customer Services
actors.description: Provisions subscriber credentials and dataset access before go-live

values.name: suspended
values.description: Delivery suspended (e.g. non-payment or technical issue)

identification: MUST: Use instrument_numeric_code as the permanent instrument identifier in all systems
MUST NOT: Use instrument_alpha_code as a permanent key — it MAY be reused after delisting
SHOULD: Store both alpha and numeric codes, but key all joins on numeric code
delivery: MUST: Authenticate with user_id, password, and dataset_name before accessing FTP
SHOULD: Test FTP access as soon as credentials are received from Customer Services
MUST: Subscribe to required record types in writing before go-live
SHOULD: Select only record types relevant to the subscriber's use case to minimise processing overhead
file_format: MUST: Parse the 41-char leading record header before interpreting any data payload
MUST: Use continuation_sequence_number to reconstruct multi-record payloads
SHOULD: Handle filler fields (reserved for future use) by ignoring content
MUST: Interpret run_date using CCYYMMDD format
statistics: MUST: New trades (on-book and published off-book) increment volume, value, and number_of_trades for trade date T
MUST: Same-day cancellations decrement volume, value, and number_of_trades for T
MUST: Next-day cancellations decrement volume, value, and number_of_trades for T-1
MUST: On-book trades and NX trades affect high/low price; off-book published trades do NOT affect high/low price
MAY: Apply statistical rules only to on-book and published off-book trade types — exclude internal/private off-book trades
sectors: SHOULD: Use ICB (Industry Classification Benchmark) sector codes for instrument classification
MAY: Use DS05 record print sequence numbers for media-layout ordering of sectors and instruments
corporate_actions: SHOULD: Process CA 01 records for dividend, rights offer, share split, and conversion events
SHOULD: Process CA 02 records for meeting diary (annual general meetings, etc.)
MUST: Apply withholding tax percentage and foreign tax fields when processing dividend payments
dummy_lines: SHOULD: Detect dummy lines by checking for 'DUMMY' in the ISIN field of EN/ENE records
MAY: Include dummy line instruments in index replication calculations as instructed by index provider

closing_price_delivery.reason: First closing price batch available at 18:30; second batch at 20:00 daily

ezip_delivery.reason: E.Zip daily dissemination file must be available via FTP by 20:30

ezip_early_delivery.reason: EE.Zip (early) daily file must be available via FTP by 19:00

snapshot_delivery.reason: Market snapshots of trades and values available at 10:30, 13:00, and after 17:00

given: subscriber has requested specific record types in writing

then.message: Dataset name, User ID, and Password issued before 11:00 on go-live day

subscriber_provisioned.result: Subscriber receives credentials and begins receiving daily EOD files

eod_file_delivered.result: EOD file (E.Zip or EE.Zip) available on FTP for all active subscribers

file_parsed_successfully.result: All records extracted and stored for downstream processing

instrument_stats_processed.result: Daily instrument statistics stored and available for query

corporate_action_processed.result: Corporate action stored and flagged for portfolio adjustment

authentication_failed.result: FTP authentication rejected — credentials not recognised

given: requested run_date file has not yet been generated
file_not_available.result: File not available — check delivery schedule and retry after scheduled delivery time

given: record does not match expected fixed-width layout for record_type + sub_type
invalid_record_format.result: Record rejected and logged for investigation

errors.message: Authentication failed. Please verify your credentials with your account manager.
The requested data file is not yet available. Please check the delivery schedule and retry.
A record could not be parsed. Please check the record layout specification for the record type.
An unrecognised record type was encountered. Please verify you are using the current specification version.
Your data subscription is not active. Please contact your account manager.

events.name: eod_data.subscriber_activated
events.description: New subscriber provisioned and go-live confirmed

events.name: eod_data.file_available
events.description: EOD dissemination file posted to FTP

events.name: eod_data.file_parsed
events.description: Subscriber successfully parsed an EOD file

events.name: eod_data.instrument_stats_stored
events.description: Daily instrument statistics record processed and stored

events.name: eod_data.corporate_action_received
events.description: Corporate action record processed for an instrument

events.name: eod_data.parse_error
events.description: A record failed to parse — logged for investigation

related.reason: Complements real-time feeds — EOD delivery provides closing prices, statistics, and corporate actions for batch processing and historical analysis
FIX persistence patterns apply to EOD flat-file storage — same append-only, sequence-keyed storage model
EOD ZIP files require structured import pipeline matching fixed-width record layouts

delivery_dashboard.notes: Show last 30 days of deliveries with parse status and record counts per type

instrument_snapshot.notes: Use instrument_numeric_code as the primary key for all lookups

record_type_map.DEE: Daily Equity Instrument Statistics (Extended — same as DE with longer alpha codes)

file_prefix_map.EE: Equity Early (early dissemination — available 1.5 hours before E.Zip)

snapshot_schedule.content: Market snapshots of trades and values
Market snapshots of trades and values
Market snapshots of trades and values (after market close)
